trans-unit.source: Dashboard API is not available. Ensure the apphost is running with Dashboard enabled.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard API is not available. Ensure the apphost is running with Dashboard enabled.

trans-unit.source: View OpenTelemetry data (logs, spans, traces) from a running apphost
trans-unit.target: View OpenTelemetry data (logs, spans, traces) from a running apphost

trans-unit.source: Failed to fetch telemetry: {0}
Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives
trans-unit.target: Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives

trans-unit.source: Output format (Table or Json)
Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)
trans-unit.target: Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)

trans-unit.source: Duration
Name
Spans
Status
Timestamp
The --limit value must be a positive number.
Maximum number of items to return
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of items to return

trans-unit.source: View structured logs from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: View structured logs from the Dashboard telemetry API

trans-unit.source: Filter by resource name
view telemetry for
Filter logs by minimum severity (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)
trans-unit.target: Filter logs by minimum severity (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)

trans-unit.source: View spans from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: View spans from the Dashboard telemetry API

trans-unit.source: The trace ID to view. If not specified, lists all traces.
trans-unit.target: 조회할 추적 ID입니다. 지정하지 않으면 모든 추적이 나열됩니다.

trans-unit.source: Filter by trace ID
Trace with ID '{0}' was not found.
View traces from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: View traces from the Dashboard telemetry API

trans-unit.source: Dashboard API returned unexpected content type. Expected JSON response.
trans-unit.target: 대시보드 API에서 예상치 못한 콘텐츠 형식이 반환되었습니다. JSON 응답이 필요합니다.
